title: PartyWoo Gold Balloons, Pack of 6 Foil Balloons, 22 Inch Giant 4D Round, Large for Birthday Decoration, Wedding Decoration, Party Decoration (Gold)
features: 4D FOIL BALLOONS ROUND: The package contains 22 inch 4D foil balloons (6), inflation straw (1), 3 m / 9.8 ft ribbon (1), ideal round foil balloons for birthday decorations, party decorations, baby shower decorations, wedding decorations

Reusable and high quality: the large 4D foil balloons are made of nylon aluminium foil, which is durable, stays inflated for a long time and is reusable. With the included inflation straw, it is easy to inflate and deflate

HOW TO MAKE IT ROUND: A crease forms when the 4D balloons are only 80% filled. If the crease becomes visible, please continue to inflate slowly and stop inflating when it becomes round and full. Please do not overfill the balloons. These balloons can be filled with air and helium, but are only floatable when filled with HELIUM

ODOURLESS: These round 4D foil balloons are odourless and come in bright colours. It is recommended to use these 4D balloons with a balloon hand pump or an electric balloon pump to achieve a better balloon shape

APPLICATIONS: These silver balloons, 4D foil balloons are perfect for birthday party decorations, silver party supplies, birthday party supplies or silver decorations for parties, bridal showers, baby showers, birthday decorations for women, silver decorations, bachelor party supplies, bachelorette decorations, birthday decorations for girls
description: Product description 4D FOIL BALLOONS ROUND: The package includes 22 inches large 4D foil balloons (6), straw for inflating (1), 3 m / 9.8 ft ribbon (1), ideal round foil balloons for birthday decorations, party decorations, baby shower decorations, wedding decorations Safety Warning Small children can choke on uninflated or burst balloons. Uninflated balloons should be kept away from children. Burst balloons must be removed immediately
